name: OCSF Security Overview
description: Cross-source security posture dashboard based on OCSF-normalized events from 16 sources

panels.title: Events by Source
panels.query: * | group count() by serverHost | sort -count | limit 20
panels.description: Total event volume per security source

panels.title: Severity Distribution
panels.query: * | filter severity != null | group count() by severity | sort -count

panels.title: Top Source IPs
panels.query: * | filter src_ip != null OR src_endpoint_ip != null | group count() by coalesce(src_ip, src_endpoint_ip) | sort -count | limit 10

panels.title: Top Active Users
panels.query: * | filter user_name != null | group count() by user_name | sort -count | limit 10

panels.title: Authentication Failures
panels.query: * | filter (action='deny' OR status='failure' OR resultType matches '^[1-9]') | count()

panels.title: Firewall Denies
panels.query: serverHost in ('fortigate-ocsf','checkpoint-ocsf','paloalto-ocsf','watchguard-ocsf') | filter action in ('deny','block','drop') | count()
